commands.review_summary:
The PR updates session transcript hit parsing to recognize QMD-normalized and dot-form archived Markdown transcript paths, with parser and memory-core visibility regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main parses archived QMD `.md` paths as non-archived full stems, and the visibility filter drops session hits whose stems do not resolve to session keys. I did not run runtime tests in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the remaining action is ordinary maintainer validation and merge handling for the active PR.

target.title: fix(memory): recognize QMD-normalized archived session transcript paths
target.author: tanshanshan
